perturbation.original_text: Each of the Company and the Investors shall be responsible for its own fees and expenses incurred in connection with the negotiation, execution, and effectuation of this Agreement and the transactions contemplated hereby, including, but not limited to attorneys' fees incurred in connection with the negotiation and execution of this Agreement and all other activities related to the foregoing.
perturbation.changed_text: Each of the Company and the Investors shall be responsible for its own fees and expenses incurred in connection with the negotiation, execution, and effectuation of this Agreement and the transactions contemplated hereby, however, the Company will cover Investor's attorneys’ fees. This includes expenses related to the negotiation and execution of this Agreement and all other activities related to the foregoing.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction. Originally, both parties were responsible for their own legal fees. Now, the modified text states the Company will cover the Investor's attorney's fees. This contradicts the first part of the sentence and creates uncertainty about who bears the financial responsibility. This creates an in-text contradiction in Section 4 where fees are being discribed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each of the Company and the Investors shall be responsible for its own fees and expenses incurred in connection with the negotiation, execution, and effectuation of this Agreement and the transactions contemplated hereby, however, the Company will cover Investor's attorneys’ fees. This includes expenses related to the negotiation and execution of this Agreement and all other activities related to the foregoing.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text and the contradicted text (which is the changed text itself in this case). Initially, both the Company and the Investors were responsible for their own legal fees. The modified text introduces an exception where the Company covers the Investor's attorney's fees. This creates a clear and direct conflict regarding who bears the financial responsibility for the Investor's legal expenses, resulting in an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Promptly following the execution of this Agreement, the Company and the Investor Group shall issue a mutually agreeable press release (the "Mutual Press Release"), announcing certain terms of this Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C. Prior to the issuance of the Mutual Press Release, neither the Company nor any of the Investors shall issue any press release or make any public announcement regarding this Agreement or take any action that would require public disclosure thereof without the prior written consent of the other party. During the Standstill Period, neither the Company nor the Investor Group or any of its Affiliates or Associates shall make any public announcement or statement that is inconsistent with or contrary to the statements made in the Mutual Press Release, except as required by law or the rules of any stock exchange (and, in any event, each party will provide the other party, prior to making any such public announcement or statement, a reasonable opportunity to review and comment on such disclosure, to the extent reasonably practicable under the circumstances, and each party will consider any comments from the other in good faith) or with the prior written consent of the other party, and otherwise in accordance with this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Promptly following the execution of this Agreement, the Company and the Investor Group shall issue a press release, either mutually agreed upon or independently, announcing the terms of this Agreement, substantially in any form. Prior to the issuance of a press release, each party may act independently without the other's consent. During the Standstill Period, each party retains the right to make public announcements or statements at their discretion, irrespective of the content of any previous releases or agreements, and without the need for mutual consent or review, as long as they comply with applicable laws and regulations.
perturbation.explanation: This modification creates a contradiction in Section 8. The original text mandates a 'mutually agreeable' press release and restricts independent announcements. The changed text allows independent press releases and statements, contradicting the original requirement for mutual agreement. The section now suffers an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Promptly following the execution of this Agreement, the Company and the Investor Group shall issue a press release, either mutually agreed upon or independently, announcing the terms of this Agreement, substantially in any form. Prior to the issuance of a press release, each party may act independently without the other's consent. During the Standstill Period, each party retains the right to make public announcements or statements at their discretion, irrespective of the content of any previous releases or agreements, and without the need for mutual consent or review, as long as they comply with applicable laws and regulations.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original text regarding press releases. The original text mandates a 'mutually agreeable' press release and restricts independent announcements. The changed text allows independent press releases and statements, contradicting the original requirement for mutual agreement, as well as the Standstill Period. This creates a clear in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each of the parties hereto irrevocably waives, and agrees not to assert, by way of motion, as a defense, counterclaim or otherwise, in any action, suit or other legal proceeding with respect to this Agreement, (a) any claim that it is not personally subject to the jurisdiction of the above-named courts for any reason, (b) that it or its property is exempt or immune from jurisdiction of any such court or from any legal process commenced in such courts (whether through service of notice, attachment before judgment, attachment in aid of execution of judgment, execution of judgment or otherwise), and (c) to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, that (i) such action, suit or other legal proceeding in any such court is brought in an inconvenient forum, (ii) the venue of such action, suit or other legal proceeding is improper or (iii) this agreement, or the subject matter hereof, may not be enforced in or by such court.
perturbation.changed_text: Each of the parties hereto irrevocably waives, and agrees not to assert, by way of motion, as a defense, counterclaim or otherwise, in any action, suit or other legal proceeding with respect to this Agreement, (a) any claim that it is not personally subject to the jurisdiction of the above-named courts for any reason, (b) that it or its property is exempt or immune from jurisdiction of any such court or from any legal process commenced in such courts (whether through service of notice, attachment before judgment, attachment in aid of execution of judgment, execution of judgment or otherwise), and (c) to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, that (i) such action, suit or other legal proceeding in any such court is brought in an inconvenient forum, (ii) the venue of such action, suit or other legal proceeding is improper or (iii) this agreement, or the subject matter hereof, may not be enforced in or by such court. HOWEVER, parties retain the right to challenge jurisdiction based on fraudulent inducement to enter the agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The added clause allows parties to challenge jurisdiction if they claim they were fraudulently induced into the agreement. This directly contradicts the previous statement where they 'irrevocably waive' any claim about not being subject to the court's jurisdiction. Now, section 13 suffers from the in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Each of the parties hereto irrevocably waives, and agrees not to assert, by way of motion, as a defense, counterclaim or otherwise, in any action, suit or other legal proceeding with respect to this Agreement, (a) any claim that it is not personally subject to the jurisdiction of the above-named courts for any reason, (b) that it or its property is exempt or immune from jurisdiction of any such court or from any legal process commenced in such courts (whether through service of notice, attachment before judgment, attachment in aid of execution of judgment, execution of judgment or otherwise), and (c) to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, that (i) such action, suit or other legal proceeding in any such court is brought in an inconvenient forum, (ii) the venue of such action, suit or other legal proceeding is improper or (iii) this agreement, or the subject matter hereof, may not be enforced in or by such court. HOWEVER, parties retain the right to challenge jurisdiction based on fraudulent inducement to enter the agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that parties irrevocably waive any claim regarding the court's jurisdiction. The changed text adds a clause allowing parties to challenge jurisdiction based on fraudulent inducement. This directly contradicts the initial waiver, creating an in-text contradiction as per the structural flaws definition. The contradicted text is the same text that was changed. The addition provides a conditional allowance to challenge jurisdiction that was previously forbidden, thus leading to a strong contradiction.
